name: Migration Safety Check
description: Tier A (fileEdited): Verifies database migrations have rollback methods and are backward-compatible. Fires immediately — destructive ops are irreversible.

patterns: {DERIVE: migration file patterns from tech-stack.md + database-rules.md}

then.prompt:
## Package Territory Check (MANDATORY — evaluate FIRST)
Before performing any checks below, verify the triggering file path.

EXCLUDED ZONES (package infrastructure — NOT compliance subjects):
• .kiro/hooks/ — AI-GCE hook infrastructure
• .kiro/steering/ — AI-DWG/AI-GCE steering infrastructure
• .kiro/agents/ — AI-GCE agent infrastructure
• .governance/ — AI-GCE governance rules/agents/logs
• compliance-log/ — AI-GCE audit trail
• project-initiation/ — AI-PILC output
• architecture/ — AI-ADLC output
• management_framework/ — Shared governance spine
• docs/compliance-* — AI-GCE generated dashboards
• templates/ — AI-DWG planning templates

If the triggering file's path starts with ANY of the above prefixes:
→ EXIT SILENTLY. Do NOT check, do NOT log, do NOT warn.

If the file is NOT in an excluded zone → proceed with checks below.

---

MIGRATION SAFETY CHECK (Tier A — immediate enforcement):

1. ROLLBACK METHOD: Does this migration have a Down/Revert method? Every migration MUST be reversible.
2. BACKWARD COMPATIBILITY: Does this migration break existing code? No column renames or drops without expand-contract pattern.
3. DESTRUCTIVE OPERATIONS: Flag any DROP TABLE, DROP COLUMN, TRUNCATE, or DELETE without WHERE clause.
4. DATA LOSS RISK: Flag any ALTER that could lose data (column type narrowing, nullable → not null without default).

If any rule is violated, warn IMMEDIATELY with severity 🔴 Critical.
If all rules pass, confirm compliance silently.

## Compliance Logging
After completing all checks, append to `compliance-log/events/{today-date}.jsonl`:
{"timestamp": "{ISO-8601-UTC}", "type": "check", "id": "chk-{date}-{time}-{seq}", "hook": "migration-safety", "trigger": "fileEdited", "ruleId": "DATA-BASELINE-01", "ruleSeverity": "critical", "result": "{pass|fail|warn}", "message": "{finding}", "sessionDedup": true}

If a previous log entry exists for the same hook + file path within this session, OVERWRITE it.
